description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aneri considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsOrange kurta made of blended fabric, has a split neckline, is sleeveless with contrast piping on the armhole, embroidery and mirror work on the chest and a curved hem with contrast panelling on the hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash separately in cold water using a mild detergentModel StatisticsThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
